name: 9q22_3_FANCC_PTCH1
description: 9q22.32-q22.33 region containing FANCC (Fanconi anaemia C) and PTCH1 (Gorlin syndrome / basal cell nevus). Flanked by intermediate SDs; rare interstitial deletions cause contiguous-gene phenotypes (Gorlin plus FANCC carrier).

architecture.internal_structure: Modest SDs flanking PTCH1/FANCC; rare large deletions encompassing both.
